entities.name: GENOMICS-ASSISTED BREEDING
entities.description: A breeding approach that utilizes modern genome resources to characterize and exploit allelic variation for germplasm enhancement and cultivar development

entities.name: ALLELIC VARIATION
entities.description: The diversity of alleles at a particular locus within a population used for crop improvement

entities.name: GERMPLASM ENHANCEMENT
entities.description: The process of improving the genetic quality and traits of plant genetic resources

entities.name: CULTIVAR DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The process of breeding and selecting new crop varieties for agricultural use

entities.name: GAB 2.0
entities.description: An advanced stage of genomics-assisted breeding focusing on targeted manipulation of allelic variation and rapid incorporation into crop improvement programs

entities.name: GENOMIC BREEDING STRATEGIES
entities.description: Strategies aimed at optimizing crop genomes through the accumulation of beneficial alleles and purging of deleterious alleles

entities.name: BENEFICIAL ALLELES
entities.description: Genetic variants that contribute positively to the desired traits of a crop

entities.name: DELETERIOUS ALLELES
entities.description: Genetic variants that have a negative impact on the traits or fitness of a crop

entities.name: CLIMATE-SMART CROP CULTIVARS
entities.description: Crop varieties developed to be resilient to climate change and environmental stress

entities.name: NUTRITIONAL VALUE
entities.description: The quality and quantity of essential nutrients present in a crop
